createdBy.description: The keycloak user id of the PDC user that created this funder

defaultTerminologySetId.description: The funder's chosen default terminology set, exposed as a stored preference for clients to apply (for example, to pre-fill the terminology set when creating an opportunity). It is not applied automatically; an opportunity uses a terminology set only when one is explicitly set on it. Null means the funder has no chosen default.
